note.item: Moved "Show Organisation feed", "Refresh details of Areas" and "Refresh details of Groups" from System Tools into the Organisation dashboard box
Fix missing admin sidebar/toolbar on System Reports page
Fix duplicate report list and broken layout on System Reports page
Always use the grid dashboard layout
Fix auto-update not appearing: pkg_ra_tools update XML missing <client>
Fix component manifest packaging causing site/admin file cross-contamination
Fix installer errors: plugin language files, admin language path, assets declaration
Auto-create empty SQL update file if missing during release
First release as a unified Ramblers Tools package
Combines com_ra_tools component, mod_ra_tools module, webservices plugin and finder plugin into a single installable package
Standardised author, licence and version metadata across all extensions
Added Joomla auto-update support via GitHub Releases
